recommendations.title: Maneater
recommendations.overview: A group of friends on vacation in a seeming island paradise are stalked by an unrelenting great white after an accident leaves them stranded and left for dead.

recommendations.title: Badland
recommendations.overview: Detective Matthias Breecher, hired to track down the worst of the Confederate war criminals, roams the Old West seeking justice. His resolve is tested when he meets a determined pioneer woman who is far more than she seems.

recommendations.title: Apache Junction
recommendations.overview: Apache Junction is an outpost of lawlessness, a haven for thieves and cold-blooded killers. After big-city reporter Annabelle Angel arrives to write an article on the town, she becomes a target when notorious gunslinger Jericho Ford comes to her aid.

recommendations.title: Captain Fantastic
recommendations.overview: Deep in the forests of the Pacific Northwest, a father devoted to raising his six kids with a rigorous physical and intellectual education is forced to leave his paradise and enter the world, beginning a journey that challenges his idea of what it me

recommendations.title: Far from the Tree
recommendations.overview: On an idyllic beach in the Pacific Northwest, curiosity gets the better of a young raccoon whose frustrated parent attempts to keep them both safe.

recommendations.title: Monster Island
recommendations.overview: In the Pacific, 1944, a Japanese soldier and a British prisoner of war are stranded on a deserted island, hunted by a deadly creature. Two mortal enemies must come together to survive the unknown.

recommendations.title: Humanoids from the Deep
recommendations.overview: After a new cannery introduces scientifically augmented salmon to a seaside town in the Pacific Northwest, a species of mysterious, mutated sea creatures begin killing the men and raping the women.

recommendations.title: Primitive War
recommendations.overview: During the Vietnam War, a recon unit ventures to an isolated jungle valley to uncover the fate of a missing platoon. They soon find themselves in a fight for their lives against an unexpected enemy — prehistoric dinosaurs.

recommendations.title: Children of the Corn: Revelation
recommendations.overview: When calls to her grandmother go unanswered, Jamie Lowell uncovers the truth behind her mysterious disappearance.

recommendations.title: Lights Out
recommendations.overview: A drifting ex-soldier turns underground fighter with the help of a just-released ex-con, pitting him against corrupt cops and hired killers now gunning for him and all those he cares about.
